title: Classes should not be derived from virtual bases
description: Classes should not be derived from virtual basesAnalyze your codeintentionality-clearmaintainabilityCode Smellbased-on-misraWhy is this an issue?More InfoThe use of virtual base classes can introduce a number of undefined and potentially confusing behaviours. The use of virtual bases is not recommended.Noncompliant code exampleclass B {}; class D: public virtual B {}; // Noncompliant, B is a virtual baseAvailable In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CIDeveloper EditionAvailable Since9.1©2025SonarSource Sàrl.
